name: Foundations of Clear Thinking
description: Build the base: mental models, intellectual humility, and the habits that make every later book land harder.

name: Know Your Biases
description: Your brain ships with bugs. Learn the systematic errors in human judgment — and how to catch them in the act.

name: Decision Frameworks
description: Turn insight into process: repeatable frameworks for deciding well under uncertainty, from WRAP to computer science.

name: Probabilistic & Strategic Mastery
description: The advanced course: think in probabilities, survive randomness, and build a latticework of worldly wisdom.

name: Timeless Wisdom & Purpose
description: Ancient counsel and modern fables on how to live, act, and find your path.

name: Habits, Energy & Influence
description: Engineer your mornings, install habits that stick — and see the hooks that products set for your attention.

name: Briefs & Reports
description: Research reports and working documents, distilled and narrated so you can absorb them on the move.
